theme.description: Theme is the tempo color theme, passed to the CLI via --theme.

configDir.description: ConfigDir specifies the $XDG_CONFIG_HOME where configuration files are stored.

profiles.description: Profiles maps a name to a Temporal connection profile; names autocomplete in the shell.

url.description: URL is the Temporal server address (host:port), passed to the CLI via --address.

description.description: Description is shown in shell autocompletion.
